# Tempest - Chronik

> German-language, mobile-first browser JRPG built with Phaser 4.2,
> TypeScript, Bun, Vite, Vitest, and Playwright. Pure deterministic systems
> drive thin Phaser scenes; content is typed and data-driven.

Use current source and tests as implementation authority. Preserve stable IDs
and save compatibility. `PLAN.md` contains unresolved work only.

## Primary Context

- [Project knowledge](docs/PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE.md): canonical structured context,
  architecture, systems, content, invariants, story direction, visual rules,
  current branch boundaries, and task-oriented file routing.
- [Open plan](PLAN.md): active worktrees and unresolved implementation tasks.
- [Asset manifest](ASSETS.md): source, license, and generation provenance.
- [Agent workflow](AGENTS.md): mandatory worktree, phase, verification, commit,
  push, and cleanup rules.
- [Human README](README.md): setup and verification commands.

## Core Implementation

- [Data registry](src/data/index.ts): typed game data and `GAME_DATA`.
- [World content](src/data/world.ts): quests, locations, lore, dialogs, NPCs,
  shops, encounters, requirements, and effects.
- [Battle engine](src/systems/battle.ts): deterministic CT combat, statuses,
  break, analysis, reactions, AI hooks, rewards, and termination.
- [Progression](src/systems/progression.ts): naming, evolution, talent trees,
  relationships, equipment sets, enchantment, and catch-up rules.
- [Save system](src/systems/save.ts): versioned saves, migration,
  normalization, import/export, autosave, and New Game Plus.
- [Overworld scene](src/scenes/OverworldScene.ts): movement, interaction,
  minimap, travel, encounters, and menu launch.
- [Battle scene](src/scenes/BattleScene.ts): presentation adapter for battle.
- [Menu scene](src/scenes/MenuScene.ts): party, inventory, equipment, status,
  talents, quests, codex, and Ranga travel.

## Verification

- [Vitest suites](test/): pure systems, data integrity, saves, playthroughs,
  balance, assets, and release rules.
- [Browser smoke](e2e/game.smoke.spec.ts): desktop and mobile Chromium flows.
- [CI](.github/workflows/ci.yml): typecheck, tests, build, and browser checks.
- [Deployment](.github/workflows/deploy.yml): verified GitHub Pages release.
